title: Analytics - Fit Test Opened
scenario: Fit Test screen opening does not increment analytics event count after several hours in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on a connected Android device.
3. Tap on the Fit Test tab to open the Fit Test screen.
4. Wait a few hours for the analytics event to be logged and processed.
5. Check the analytics backend to verify that the event was logged with the correct metrics (event count by country, gender, per session, app version, app build, and app environment).
expected: The analytics event is logged successfully after opening the Fit Test screen, with correct metrics for event count by country, gender, per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
